extraction.one_line_summary: IMPEY Daryl surprised the sprinters by climbing with GC favorites on the final 12.5km finishing circuit, then winning from reduced group.
tactical_patterns: IMPEY Daryl attacked 200 meters out despite not being protected by MITCHELTON-SCOTT, exploiting positioning over pure sprint speed.
Final climb separated pure sprinters from punchy climbers, allowing non-sprinters like ALAPHILIPPE Julian to contest finish despite bunch reformation.
KWIATKOWSKI Michał gained 10-second time bonus finishing fifth, positioning 2 seconds behind GC without targeting stage win.

rider_signals.IMPEY Daryl: positive: Won from reduced group despite telling EDMONDSON Alex not to work for him, showing tactical opportunism over team structure.
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: Cleared final climb with GC favorites to finish second, demonstrating climbing ability sustained punchy finishes.
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: positive: Strategically placed fifth for time bonus without spending energy on stage win, banking seconds efficiently.
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: negative: Lost to climbers on final circuit despite bunch sprint setup, revealing vulnerability to punchy finishing circuits.
